    S

    setAngle(double) - Methode in Klasse de.drvbund.lernlabit.lb.javaproject.model.RotatableIconLabel
    Sets the rotation angle for the icon.
    setColumnAlignment(int, int, JTable) - Methode in Klasse de.drvbund.lernlabit.lb.javaproject.view.BookingPanel
    Sets the horizontal alignment for a specific table column.
    setOnTickListener(Runnable) - Methode in Klasse de.drvbund.lernlabit.lb.javaproject.controller.SimulationController
    Registers a callback to be executed on each simulation tick.
    setSpeedFactor(double) - Methode in Klasse de.drvbund.lernlabit.lb.javaproject.controller.SimulationController
    Sets the speed factor for the simulation.
    SimulationController - Klasse in de.drvbund.lernlabit.lb.javaproject.controller
    Controls the simulation time and speed for the train simulator.
    Start - Klasse in de.drvbund.lernlabit.lb.javaproject
    Entry point for the Train Simulator application.
    Start() - Konstruktor für Klasse de.drvbund.lernlabit.lb.javaproject.Start
     
    Station - Klasse in de.drvbund.lernlabit.lb.javaproject.model
    Represents a train station in the transportation network.
    Station(int, String, int, int, int) - Konstruktor für Klasse de.drvbund.lernlabit.lb.javaproject.model.Station
    Creates a new station with all required information.
    StationDAO - Klasse in de.drvbund.lernlabit.lb.javaproject.dataAccess
    Data Access Object for managing Station entities.
    StationDAO() - Konstruktor für Klasse de.drvbund.lernlabit.lb.javaproject.dataAccess.StationDAO
